name: dogfood
description: Dogfood — stress-test any AI agent against real dogfooding scenarios before shipping.

scripts.api:dev: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8008
scripts.thumbnail:mp4: ffmpeg -y -framerate 30 -i scripts/thumbnail/frames/frame_%04d.png -vf scale=trunc(iw/2)*2:trunc(ih/2)*2 -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -crf 18 -preset medium -movflags +faststart docs/thumb.mp4
scripts.thumbnail: pnpm thumbnail:frames && pnpm thumbnail:gif && pnpm thumbnail:mp4 && pnpm thumbnail:png && echo "✓ docs/thumb.{gif,mp4,png} ready"
